title: Reject relayed link-local DAO origins
description: At roots, allow link-local DAO origin only when immediate authenticated sender matches the origin and the advertised parent is root. Perform rejection after signature/replay classification but before mutation.
acceptance_criteria: Direct authenticated link-local DAO with parent root can apply; malicious relay or non-root parent fails without route or persistence mutation; precedence tests pass.
close_reason: Restricted signed link-local DAO origins to direct authenticated origin IID with exact parent=root after replay classification and before mutation. Added malicious relay non-mutation/direct retry test; external vectors pass.
